title: Automation or Notification for Date Within Time Period

posts.author: thetrio84 (Alex K)
posts.cookedHtml:
How can I set email notifications for when a deadline is within a certain time period?

The only automations I see that involve date are “When date has passed”.

Specifically, we have deadlines for reports on Monday. I would like to be notified by email when the date is within 1 week so that I can start working on that report. Ideally this automation would apply to subitems as well as items in a group.

posts.author: Mindflows_Shanine (Shanine Velarde)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Alex!

Shanine here from Mindflows.

You can achieve this through a third party app either Zapier or Make.com!

Hope this helps.

posts.author: thetrio84 (Alex K)
posts.cookedHtml:
There’s no built in way to do this in Monday? It seems like a pretty simple task. We’re a very small organization that already pays a lot of money for Monday, we’re not really interested in paying more for external apps.

This can easily be accomplished in Google Docs with Conditional Notifications. I’m surprised it can’t be done in Monday.

My colleague has set this up on her board, but it appears the functions are no longer searchable or findable on Monday. Please advise.
